title: Language proficiency levels - Open Government Portal
content:
## Language proficiency levels
This dataset provides the format and list of values for language proficiency levels in the Government of Canada.
Find more resources with the keyword “ reference data ”
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Treasury Board of Canada Secretariat
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
